author: Alex S
subject: v2.5.0
body: # [2.5.0](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/compare/v2.4.1...v2.5.0) (2018-02-06) ### Bug Fixes * **doc:** add maximum width to images (fix [#2685](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2685)) ([#2686](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2686)) ([f4b5377](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/f4b5377)) ### Features * support for algolia insights ([#2689](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/issues/2689)) ([96b8d61](https://github.com/algolia/instantsearch.js/commit/96b8d61))
